text: Coarse GEMV, A^T A SYRK, blocked-QR internal GEMMs, and typed LU/Cholesky/QR facade seams are complete. BackendConfig/metadata/capability validation and provider-specific compose thresholds are executable. gale-laws now supplies independent-oracle BackendConformanceSuite. Full core JVM/JS, laws, parity, interop, Vector, and benchmark compile gates pass.
